---
title: ""
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Week 10 - Friday, April 10th

### Announcements.

Hi class. You are reading the words that I wrote; amazing! I can almost imagine speaking these words in our classroom; every seat full and the wifi is fast and our broken VGA and HDMI cables have been replaced by Chancellor Rich Lyons himself (smiling; a public servant).

Anyway, for this please complete the following :

1.  Watch these videos
    1.  <https://youtu.be/HDWYz5ror4o>
2.  Blah.

### Class Slides and Materials

```{=html}
<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/calstats/Lectures/8_3LevelExperiment.html" width="800" height="500" title=""></iframe>
```

# For Next Class.

1.  Watch these videos introducing NHST
2.  Read Chapter 9 and take the Chapter Quiz
